SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: GENDER EQUALITY IS AN INITIATIVE TO MOTIVATE AND MOBILIZE MILLENNIALS TO MAKE GENDER EQUALITY A PRIORITY AND TAKE ACTION TO SUPPORT LEADERS AND ORGANIZATIONS.
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description2Txt: ARC HIGHWAY DESIGN COMPETITION IS AN INTERDISCIPLINARY PARTNERSHIP WORKING TO FACILITATE NEW THINKING, METHODS, MATERIALS, AND SOLUTIONS FOR WILDLIFE CROSSING STRUCTURES.
